summary: TypeScript code is excellent (explicit types, proper error handling, clean separation of concerns). Critical workflow flaw: the `bump` job runs on push/pull_request but hard-codes `COMMIT_LOG: fixtures/feat.log` (lines 31–33), preventing the git-log fallback in bump.ts from ever triggering. Without fixtures present, push triggers fail. Workflow should either (1) guard `bump` job to `if: github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'`, (2) conditionally set env var only for workflow_dispatch, or (3) pass an empty default to allow script fallback. Also missing `set -euo pipefail` in bash steps (lines 45, 59). Well-designed for manual testing but broken for real CI/CD on plain push.
